summary: Matrix recording captures an exciting first set but a second set that suffers from overbearing keyboards.
review: The show delivers a very good, energetic first set, while the second set feels muddied by aggressive Vince/Welnick keyboards that overwhelm songs like "Saint" and "Comes A Time," with Garcia apparently stepping back. The matrix source is praised as solid, though reviewers give no specific technical complaints.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is mixed (strong first set, weak second) while the recording is regarded as good; limited number of reviews yields moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit sound issues mentioned; reviewers note matrix recordings are generally preferable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set flows well and energizes the crowd; second set loses cohesion due to dominant keyboard playing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Defers to keyboards on the second set, perceived as a negative.
band_member_comments.Keys: Aggressive Vince/Welnick keyboards overrun tunes, especially in the second set.
